author: mark
text:
Disambiguate README SPEC cross-references to their files

There is no top-level SPEC.md: docs/ holds three SPEC-*.md files with independent section numbering. 'SPEC §11' was doubly ambiguous — SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md §11 (Hand-edit workflow) and SPEC-lifecycle-sync-participants.md §11 (Config inheritance) — and the README used the bare form for both.

Qualified all eight citations with their filename: the four hand-edit/shell-sequence refs now name SPEC-orphan-branch-state.md; the participant-enforcement section's §9/§11/§8.1/§5.1 refs now name SPEC-lifecycle-sync-participants.md. Docs-only; suite green.
